chapter_title.ar: باب مَا تَزَوَّجَ عَلَيْهِ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ فَاطِمَةَ ( عليها السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 45 – What Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> got married upon with Fatima<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/103)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/103)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ زَوَّجَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَاطِمَةَ ( عليها السلام ) عَلَى دِرْعٍ حُطَمِيَّةٍ يَسْوَى ثَلَاثِينَ دِرْهَماً .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ibn Bukeyr who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> got Fatima<sup>asws</sup> married upon a (dower of a) cracked shield valued at thirty Dirhams’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn ‘Isa from ibn Faddal from ibn Bukayr who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, arranged the marriage of Fatimah and Ali, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, for a mahr (dower) from one shield made by Hatmiyah (a certain people) valued at thirty dirham.’”
